metadata.description: Official Gipity plugins for agent CLIs (Claude Code, Grok, Codex, ...)

plugins.name: gipity
plugins.description: Gipity cloud for agent CLIs (Claude Code, Grok, Codex, ...) - hosting, Postgres databases, serverless functions, auth, file storage, realtime, and AI services (image, speech, LLM), all driven by the gipity CLI. Build, deploy, and verify live apps without leaving your session.
